capabilities_used.evidence: [2024-07-28] "Bitcoin and USDT.D are inversely correlated. It's so obvious that $BTC is going to break the Bull Flag while $USDT.D is breaking down the Bear Flag"; 图 5 直接把 BTC 标成 Bull Flag。
[2024-07-28] 同一条推文把 USDT.D 明确标成 "Bear Flag"，作为 BTC 看多的反向确认；图 5 也是 BTC Bull Flag vs USDT.D Bear Flag 的成对框架。

[2025-04-28] "A third falling wedge breakout has just occurred in $Doge/$BTC"；[2025-06-29] "Dogecoin has been forming falling wedges repeatedly on support levels"；[2024-12-31] "If $BTC breaks out of the Falling Wedge, a Huge Surge will follow."

[2024-07-29] "Bitcoin is breaking out this inverse Head and Shoulders Pattern"；[2024-01-29] "Bitcoin may be building up an inverse Head & Shoulders pattern"；[2025-01-31] ETH "Inverse Head & Shoulders Pattern Brewing"。

[2024-10-31] "Bitcoin shows up two identical Cup with handle pattern"；[2024-11-30] "Bitcoin has completed its second Cup-with-Handle pattern of the decade"；[2025-01-30] "Cup with Handle Pattern on Daily Chart ... target of $121k"。
[2025-01-29] "Dogecoin might be forming an Ascending Triangle on the 4-hour chart"；[2024-03-31] "Bitcoin has already printed two third of an Ascending Triangle in H4 chart"。
[2024-08-31] "Bitcoin EMA crossover and OBV price action may trigger $BTC to pump again"；图 2 明确使用 20 EMA / 50 EMA 回踩延续逻辑；[2025-04-28] "reclaiming the 100 EMA after breakdown"。
[2024-06-24] "Double Bottom pattern ... associated with RSI Bullish Divergence"；[2025-03-29] "RSI signals Bullish Divergence"；[2024-01-31] "Hidden Bullish divergence is seen in RSI"。

[2024-06-25] "Bitcoin Daily RSI has come below 30, which is the Oversold Zone"；[2025-01-29] "RSI indicates momentum gains after hitting the oversold zone"；[2025-03-28] "weekly RSI suggests a strong potential rebound"。
[2024-03-31] "Bitcoin MACD Bullish Crossover is happening on H4 chart"；[2025-06-30] "Dogecoin MACD Bullish Cross confirmed"；[2025-09-30] "Golden Cross on MACD is happening, Histogram turns green"。
[2025-08-30] "Dogecoin Bollinger BandWidth (BBW) indicates a potential surge incoming"，说明他会用波动压缩后扩张的框架。
[2024-01-30] "Bitcoin forms consolidation at/above Fib 0.618"，直接把 0.618 当作牛市延续支撑。
[2024-06-30] "DXY is hitting an Over-Head-Resistance ... it brings Bitcoin a spike"；[2025-02-28] "DXY MACD Bearish Crosses ... led to a Drop in DXY and a Pump in BTC"。
[2024-06-24] "Bitcoin is ready to go Parabolic after the 4th Halving"；他多次把 post-halving rally 当作结构模板。
[2024-02-29] "Bitcoin is following the moves in 2017-2021"；图 3、图 6、图 7、图 8 都是 DOGE 跨周期类比；[2025-01-29] "complete the pattern in Cycle 3"。
[2024-07-28] "Bitcoin behaves Strong Uptrend Momentum on Macro Chart"；[2025-06-29] "$Doge ... forming a higher high after a trendline breakout. Uptrend confirmed"。
[2024-01-29] "The long lower wick grabbed the liquidity of recent support too"，说明他会把长下影+扫流动性作为确认。
[2024-07-27] "Bullish Engulfing Candle Pattern is seen ... just before the Rally"。
[2025-06-26] "Dogecoin has just formed a lower wick on the 3-day candle in the long lower wick zone"；[2024-01-29] 强调 hammer 的长下影。

[2025-04-29] "Dogecoin has been moving within different Ranges, experiencing both false breakdowns and breakouts"；[2025-06-27] ETH "returned to the consolidation zone after a false breakout and a false breakdown"。
[2024-06-24] "DOGE has formed Double Bottom pattern"；[2024-06-28] "Bitcoin is forming an equal low"；[2025-08-29] "Dogecoin double bottom sets the target at $0.50"。
[2025-03-28] "The fall in Bitcoin dominance signals the start of Altseason 2025-2027"；[2025-01-30] "$Doge.D/$BTC.D ... Dogecoin might outperform $BTC and lead the altseason"。
[2025-04-28] "weekly candle closed, reclaiming the 100 EMA after breakdown"；[2024-03-30] "Bullish Crossover from 50 & 100 sma ... it is now confirmed"。
他频繁使用抛物式路径预测，例如 [2024-02-29] "It is just at the last stage, which goes parabolic"；不过更多是作为上涨路径类比，而非顶部做空。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Fractal Cycle Analogy
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Map the current price structure to a prior cycle's geometry, timing, and swing sequence, then project the next leg based on visual similarity rather than strict indicator rules.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将当前价格结构与历史周期的几何形态、时间位置和波段顺序做类比，用视觉分形相似性而非严格指标规则去推演下一段走势。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-03-27] "$Doge to the MOON ... this is the trend"；图 3、图 6、图 7、图 8 都在比较 2014/2017/2021/2024 的重复结构；[2025-01-29] "Cycle 3"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Curved Arc / Chord Projection
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use curved arcs, chord segments, and geometric intersections as dynamic support/resistance and timing guides for large trend acceleration.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用弧线、弦段和几何交点作为动态支撑/阻力与加速时点判断，推演大级别趋势爆发。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-08-30] "DOGECOIN developed solid bases in Chord Segments. When it retests to the intersection to the curve, $DOGE will surge"；图 3、图 8 也用大弧线做趋势轨迹。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: OBV Trendline Breakout Confirmation
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Treat OBV breaking its own descending trendline or reclaiming structure before price expansion as confirmation that accumulation is leading price.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将 OBV 自身跌势线突破或结构收复视为价格上行前的确认，认为量能累积领先价格启动。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "Bitcoin (on balance volume) OBV has broken out a descending trendline and retested it"；图 2 标题就是 "Bitcoin - <EMA+OBV>"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Gaussian Channel Regime Shift
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use Gaussian Channel color flips, mid-band recapture, and support reactions to define the start of a bull regime and continuation odds.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用高斯通道颜色翻转、中轨收复和通道支撑反应来定义牛市 regime 的开启与延续概率。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-07-30] "ETH Gaussian Channel has turned GREEN"；[2024-08-30] "Bitcoin has been supported by Gaussian Channel"；[2025-04-29] "Dogecoin Weekly Chart with the Gaussian Channel"。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Nested Bullish Structure Stack
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 多层嵌套看涨结构共振
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify stacked bullish continuation structures on multiple scales, such as a pennant on top of a bull flag, and treat overlap as amplified breakout odds.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别多时间尺度上的嵌套看涨延续结构，例如旗形之上再叠加三角整理，并把这种共振视为更强的突破概率。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-05-30] "Bitcoin has formed a Bull Pennant on the top of a Bull Flag"；图 1 也是 DOGE post-pole pennant measured move。

personal_quirks.quote: $Doge to the MOON 🔥 Don't look at the number but this is the trend🚀
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 优先看大级别路径和结构斜率，不纠结当前价格绝对值是否显得夸张。

personal_quirks.quote: No reason not to believe it. $DOGE to the moon 🚀
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 只要历史重复结构仍在，他倾向继续持有原先的强多叙事。

personal_quirks.quote: If you zoom out, there is nothing changed 🔥 #Bitcoin Bullish Pennant is still there 🚀
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 短期噪音不重要，回到更高时间框架验证原始结构是否失效。

personal_quirks.quote: How we can't be so bullish to #Bitcoin??
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 当多个看涨形态共振时，他会公开提升主观确信度，而不是保持中性措辞。

personal_quirks.quote: The long lower wick grabbed the liquidity of recent support too.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 长下影扫流动性后收回，是他认可的底部确认细节。

unique_traits: 他和一般形态派 TA 的区别在于，极度依赖“历史分形重演 + 几何投射 + 高时间框架路径类比”，尤其偏爱把 DOGE/BTC 放进跨周期模板里讲故事。其次，他常把单一 setup 升级成叙事型共振框架，例如 BTC 对 USDT.D、价格对 OBV、旗形对旗形嵌套。整体内容强烈偏多、目标值激进，兼具交易员和流量型图表内容创作者特征。

high_conviction_phrases: it won't be different this time
